# record

Start or stop screen recording

## Usage

```bash
agent-device record start [path] [--fps <n>] [--hide-touches] | record stop
```

## Session Requirement

Usually expects an active session.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- None

## Allowed Flags

- `--fps <n>`: Record: target frames per second (iOS physical device runner)
- `--hide-touches`: Record: disable touch overlays in the final video

## Platform Coverage

| Target | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| iOS sim | Yes |
| iOS device | Yes |
| tvOS sim | Yes |
| macOS | Yes |
| Android emu | Yes |
| Android device | Yes |
| Android TV | Yes |
